tasks.label: Clean

icon.tooltip: xcodebuild clean + 删除 .build 与 dist

tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -eu; rm -rf "${PWD}/.build" "${PWD}/dist"; xcodebuild -project "Gas Mask.xcodeproj" -scheme "Gas Mask" clean; echo "已删除 .build、dist，并完成 xcodebuild clean"'

tasks.label: 打包
tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -eu; DERIVED_DATA_PATH="${PWD}/.build"; DIST_DIR="${PWD}/dist"; mkdir -p "$DIST_DIR"; xcodebuild -project "Gas Mask.xcodeproj" -scheme "Gas Mask" -configuration Release -derivedDataPath "$DERIVED_DATA_PATH" ARCHS="arm64" CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO COPY_PHASE_STRIP=NO build; APP_PATH="$DERIVED_DATA_PATH/Build/Products/Release/Gas Mask.app"; test -d "$APP_PATH"; ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent "$APP_PATH" "$DIST_DIR/Gas Mask-Release.zip"; echo "已输出: $DIST_DIR/Gas Mask-Release.zip"'
